title: Drishti Eye Care is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Drishti Eye Care is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
